rulings.Case Title: ROBERT CULVER et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order To Realign Defendant-Heir As Plaintiff
rulings.Rulings: ON CALENDAR FOR TUESDAY, APRIL 20, 2010 IN DEPARTMENT 220 AT 9:30AM, LINE 1. PLAINTIFFS ROBERT CULVER, MARYLOU CULVER, AND TIMOTHY CULVER'S Motion For Order To Realign Defendant-Heir As Plaintiff is Granted. No opposition filed. = (220/HEK)
